title: PSYC 231 Lecture 23 Racism and Sexism Quiz

questions.prompt: Which statement best reflects the idea that race is a social construct?
options: Race is determined purely by biology
Race categories are created and maintained by society
Race has no impact on lived experiences
Race is identical across all cultures

questions.prompt: Racial essentialism refers to the belief that:
options: Racial groups have fixed, inherent traits
Race is entirely fluid and changing
Understanding how multiple identities interact to shape experiences
Comparing individuals within one group only

questions.prompt: Which is an example of benevolent sexism?
options: Women should be cherished and protected by men
Women are less intelligent than men

questions.prompt: Which is an example of hostile sexism?
options: Women are pure and should be protected
Women are trying to control men

questions.prompt: According to system justification theory, which group may show outgroup favoritism?
Compensatory stereotypes are best described as:
options: Stereotypes that balance negative traits with positive ones

questions.prompt: Which example best reflects environmental racism?
options: Equal access to clean water across communities
Marginalized groups being exposed to higher levels of environmental hazards

questions.prompt: Which dimension pair is central to the warmth and competence model?
Which group is typically perceived as high warmth but low competence in the warmth-competence model?
